description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 🐧 Linux Builds that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix strategy to build Godot engine for various versions and configurations on an ubuntu-22.04 environment. For each build, check out the Godot repository and a custom module, set up a custom buildroot, load the .scons_cache directory, compile the engine with scons, and upload the build artifact if it's a production build.
